title: The Graveyard (Unofficial Port)
description: Continuation of The Graveyard, updated for newer Minecraft versions.
body:
![yard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e93032a9e470bf2e197f55dcbe47bf2d475f3844_0.webp)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8db823e49cabc6506dc1fcf02c5581cf555f1b3f.png)

**The Graveyard adds new spooky structures, mobs and blocks to make your minecraft adventure more thrilling and challenging.
Every structure, mob and biome was built with a lot of attention to detail to create an immersive experience for you.**

![geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/324c3ac34cb7fb2e121d2099611f563887b23331_0.webp)

![fabric api](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6c8168b191e637f106b67868820808bacf06696_0.webp)

**The Graveyard (Unofficial Port)**

A community-maintained continuation of The Graveyard, updated for newer Minecraft versions.

The Graveyard adds a large collection of spooky content to Minecraft, including haunted structures, dangerous mobs, powerful bosses, decorative blocks, and immersive world generation. Explore abandoned graveyards, haunted houses, ruins, crypts, memorials, and other mysterious locations while facing terrifying creatures lurking in the darkness.

**Features**

Haunted structures and graveyards

Unique mobs such as Ghouls, Revenants, Nightmares, and Skeleton Creepers

Boss encounters, including the Corrupted Champion (Lich)

Decorative graveyard-themed blocks and building materials

Configurable spawning and world generation

Atmospheric exploration and adventure content

Unofficial Port

This project is an unofficial port of The Graveyard originally created by finallion_13.

The goal of this port is to keep the mod available on modern Minecraft versions while preserving the original gameplay, atmosphere, content, and design as closely as possible.

**Credits**

Original Mod Author:
**finallion_13**

All original assets, textures, models, sounds, concepts, and content belong to their respective owners.

Minecraft is a trademark of Mojang Studios. This project is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Mojang Studios or Microsoft.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8db823e49cabc6506dc1fcf02c5581cf555f1b3f.png)

**🛠️ Support**

For issues related to this Unofficial Port, please report them on the GitHub repository: [The Graveyard (Unofficial Port)](https://github.com/SmartStreamLabs/The-Graveyard-Unofficial-Port-/issues)
